14#include "llvm/IR/Comdat.h"
15#include "llvm/ADT/StringMap.h"
16using namespace llvm;
17
18Comdat::Comdat(SelectionKind SK, StringMapEntry<Comdat> *Name)
19 : Name(Name), SK(SK) {}
20
21Comdat::Comdat(Comdat &&C) : Name(C.Name), SK(C.SK) {}
22
23Comdat::Comdat() : Name(nullptr), SK(Comdat::Any) {}
24
25StringRef Comdat::getName() const { return Name->first(); }
